title: Trichanthecium strictissimum
intro: There is not enough information available about the plant Trichanthecium strictissimum.
taxonomy: Trichanthecium strictissimum is classified as a species of lichen in the genus Trichanthecium. It belongs to the family Parmeliaceae and the order Lecanorales. This species is a type of crustose lichen that grows on rocks and trees. Trichanthecium strictissimum is a relatively rare and poorly studied species, found in subtropical regions. Its classification is primarily based on morphological characteristics and molecular phylogenetic analysis.
preparations: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on herbal preparations of Trichanthecium strictissimum.
